THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, DIANA LEE, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 320 TURK ST,#100 & 320 TURK ST.PARKING STALL #3,SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-04-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT IS AGAINST DEFENDANTS DIANA LEE AND JOHN LEE AND ALL SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
